dialogos.texto_en: I didn't know there was this kind of an event.
Hmm, too bad.\nIf we had known earlier,\nwe might have been able to adjust the schedule.
What posters are the two of you looking at?
Ah, Fu-kun!
You came to see me after all?\nHehe, I'm happy.
It's not like I came to see you on purpose...\nI was just passing by...
Hm?\nYou came to see me, right, Futaro-kun?
Wait a sec...
You're so shy.\nIt's really cute, you know?
Geez...\nAnyway, didn't you say\nyou were going to the Ryukyu Glass shop, Ichika?
Yeah, but just like you,\nI got interested in the poster Nino was looking at.
Oh, the fireworks festival poster.\nThe festival is held in mid-April%p-2;――
Wait, what?! That's too early!\nIt's still spring, isn't it?
It's the earliest fireworks festival in Japan.\nAs expected of Okinawa,\nthey get a head start on summer before anyone else.
The venue is near the beach, so I'm sure\nthe fireworks would reflect on the sea and\nlook beautiful. I really wanted to see it if I could.
But if it's in mid-April,\nyou'll already be in Tokyo by then,\nwon't you, Futaro-kun?
Yeah, that's right.
Then, we'll have to put off watching fireworks together\nuntil summer.
I'm planning to go back home for a long vacation,\nso I think I can make it\nto the local fireworks festival.
Hey, how about the two of us\nwatch the fireworks together this year?
Why just the two of us?
Why?\n...Do you really want me to say it?
It's not that.\nIt's just that since we have the chance,\nwhy don't all six of us go together?
Hmm, all six of us, huh.
But, Fu-kun, I think there should be times\nwhen we watch fireworks, just the two of us.
You only need to see fireworks once to be satisfied,\nright? Studying is more important than that.
Hmmph.\nEven though you're being invited by a girl,\nyou're prioritizing studying.
Well...as a university student,\nstudying is the most important.
But, is there another reason behind it?
By the time the fireworks festival comes around...\nI wonder how we'll be spending this summer.
I'll pass.
Whaaat? Why?\nSuch an immediate response really hurts, you know.
Well, you should consider your position.\nIf an actress was walking with a man,\npeople would make a big fuss.
Ah, that's what you mean.
I wonder if that's just a front, and actually,\nthere's someone else you want to walk with...\ncould that be it?
How about it, Fu-kun?\nI think there should be times\nwhen we watch fireworks, just the two of us.
You only need to see fireworks once to be satisfied,\nright? Studying is more important than that.
Hmmph.\nEven though you're being invited by a girl,\nyou're prioritizing studying.
Well...as a university student,\nstudying is the most important.
But, is there another reason behind it?
By the time the fireworks festival comes around...\nI wonder how we'll be spending this summer.
Shouldn't it be with all five of you?\nI heard that's a memory of you and your mother.
...Yes, that is true.
Of course,\nwe'll watch them as a group of five.\nBut there's more than one fireworks festival, you know?
Fu-kun, I think there should be times\nwhen we watch fireworks, just the two of us.
You only need to see fireworks once to be satisfied,\nright? Studying is more important than that.
Hmmph.\nEven though you're being invited by a girl,\nyou're prioritizing studying.
Well...as a university student,\nstudying is the most important.
But, is there another reason behind it?
By the time the fireworks festival comes around...\nI wonder how we'll be spending this summer.
After graduating high school,\nour lives will all go separate ways. Summer will be\ncompletely different from what it used to be, huh.
I'm sure there will be fewer opportunities\nfor us all to get together.
...That's true.
There may be things that'll change,\nbut there are things that won't.
Our relationship has changed a lot\nsince we first met, right?
Yet, the time we've spent together hasn't changed.\nThat's the reason why we're here.
It was tough when we went\nto the fireworks festival together.\nEveryone got scattered.
Yeah, I remember being helped out\nby Futaro-kun at that time.
Looking back, it's a good memory.
We don't know how we'll change in the future...\nbut we'll surely continue to make memories.
Hmm? You'll make memories with us?
Hey, Fu-kun.\nYou'll be coming back for summer vacation, right?
Let's watch fireworks together again!\nAnd go shopping or go to the beach...
There are just so many things I want to do together,\nso make sure to clear your schedule!
It's hard to know what the future holds,\neven if they're talking about summer vacation plans.
Ah, I just had an idea!\nWhy don't I go to your place, Futaro-kun,\nand have you show me around Tokyo?
HUH?! Hold on, Ichika!\nI won't allow you to just cut in like that.
H-hey, don't just go on assuming things\nwithout considering my schedule%p-2;――
Huh?\nBut I have to go to Tokyo for work sometimes.\nIsn't it a good idea to have some perks like that?
Well then, I'll come along too.\nI could even go every month if I wanted to.
(They're not even listening to me...)
(I have a bad feeling about where this conversation\n is headed. I should probably step away\n from this situation for now.)
